personal.name: Sanjaykumar S
personal.title: Associate Software Engineer & Generative AI Engineer
personal.tagline: Building production-ready AI systems, multi-agent workflows, and scalable GenAI solutions.
personal.summary: BCA graduate from SRM Institute of Science and Technology with 1+ year of experience building production-ready AI systems and multi-agent workflows. Specialized in CrewAI, AutoGen, Google ADK, and n8n, with strong proficiency in Python, FastAPI, Next.js, and Node.js. Experienced in LLM integration, prompt engineering, embeddings, and vector databases (ChromaDB). Passionate about developing secure, scalable, and real-time GenAI solutions leveraging cloud and GPU-backed environments.

bullets: Built end-to-end multi-agent AI recruitment platform using Google ADK & Gemini
Designed agent pipeline with semantic matching (ChromaDB) and deterministic scoring engine
Developed FastAPI backend and Next.js dashboard with role-based access and real-time insights
Automated workflows using n8n for interview planning and email orchestration
Engineered QR-based real-time interactive system with WebSockets, 3D mesh generation, and voice control
Built and deployed multi-agent workflows using CrewAI, AutoGen, Google ADK, and n8n
Designed and optimized autonomous agent systems for task orchestration and workflow automation
Developed scalable, modular agent-based solutions for enterprise use cases including auto-insurance claims, client insight analytics, and banking contact-center automation
Integrated no-code platforms with AI frameworks to enhance data-driven decision workflows and client analysis efficiency
Performed responsive webpage testing across multiple devices to ensure optimal UI performance
Identified and resolved data integrity issues, ensuring accuracy and consistency in web content
Built visually appealing, user-friendly interfaces using HTML and CSS
Gained foundational JavaScript skills to enhance interactivity and dynamic webpage behavior

education.institution: SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Ramapuram

projects.title: Multi-Agent AI Recruitment Platform
projects.description: End-to-end AI recruitment platform with semantic candidate matching and deterministic scoring.
projects.longDesc: Built using Google ADK and Gemini, this platform features a semantic matching pipeline powered by ChromaDB, a deterministic scoring engine, a FastAPI backend, and a Next.js dashboard with role-based access control and real-time analytics insights.

projects.title: Enterprise Agentic Workflow Automation
projects.description: Scalable multi-agent solutions for auto-insurance claims, client analytics, and banking automation.
projects.longDesc: Designed and deployed modular agent-based systems using CrewAI, AutoGen, and n8n for enterprise use cases including auto-insurance claims processing, client insight analytics, and banking contact-center automation. Integrated no-code platforms with AI frameworks for enhanced decision workflows.

projects.title: QR-Based Real-Time Interactive System
projects.description: Real-time interactive system with WebSockets, 3D mesh generation, and voice control.
projects.longDesc: Engineered a QR-code triggered real-time interactive experience leveraging WebSockets for live communication, 3D mesh generation for visual rendering, and voice control integration for hands-free interaction.
